title: pomaderris cinerea
intro: Pomaderris cinerea, also known as the Grey Pomaderris or Grey Willow Pomaderris, is a shrub native to eastern Australia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Pomaderris cinerea include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate cold and flu symptoms, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of health conditions, including fever, coughs, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne.
